docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DHL EXPRESS MEDIATED SETTLEMENT. ALL PARTIES NOT PRESENT. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,196.23 FILED BY SCO AS TO DEFENDANT DHL EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2007 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-14-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 CLERK: COMMISSIONER SLAVIT; CLERK: F. RAYRAY. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-19-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DHL EXPRESS
CORRESPONDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT DHL EXPRESS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK S. VANTREE. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (506).
